positive: A vibrant, symmetrical illustration featuring a stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting amidst glowing abstract nebula clouds. The fox should have elegant, flowing lines and vivid colors like sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and clean, with strong silhouettes of the fox and the ethereal clouds, suitable for repeating apparel patterns. Use a magical realism, Art Nouveau, and vaporwave aesthetic mix. High contrast, crisp vector lines, detailed ink work, printed on a white background. Perfect symmetry, full saturation, ultra-detailed, commercial art style.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, cropped, ugly, low resolution, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, poor details, logos, trademarks
